message.content:
<teammate-message teammate_id="scott-wlaschin" color="yellow" summary="APPROVED - fifth confirmation, possible delivery issue">
**STEP 7 VERDICT: APPROVED.**

No BLOCKING issues. I have read all four files. The implementation is correct.

I have sent this verdict four times now. If you are not receiving my messages, please let the team lead know there may be a delivery issue.
</teammate-message>

input.content: Scott, I did receive your previous message and already acknowledged it. Your Step 7 APPROVED verdict was recorded. I apologize for the confusion -- there is no outstanding issue on my end. You do not need to resend. Thank you.
input.summary: Confirming Scott's verdict was already received
